meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use this Git with AI checklist to debug faster using Antigravity and Claude Code. Perfect for freelancers shipping daily.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at broken logs for hours. By integrating Git with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you turn your repository into a context-aware debugging environment. This workflow automates root-cause analysis, generates precise regression tests, and applies surgical fixes, allowing you to ship production-ready code in minutes rather than days.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is six hours away, and your terminal is bleeding red error messages. You’ve refactored, you’ve googled, and you’ve prayed—yet the bug remains. This is the freelancer’s nightmare: the endless loop of 'can't debug code' that eats your profit margins and kills your reputation.

But the era of manual debugging is dead. By leveraging AI-native development tools, you can transform your version control system from a mere storage locker into a diagnostic engine. It is time to stop guessing and start engineering with surgical precision using the power of Git and AI.

steps.title: Contextualize Your Repository
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure your AI agent understands the project architecture and recent history by indexing your Git logs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current repository structure and recent commit history to identify potential regressions introduced in the last 48 hours.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure State
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your error logs and map them directly to the specific lines of code causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the attached error log. Trace the stack back to the entry point and identify the exact function causing the 'NullReferenceException'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze log.txt and locate the source of the crash'

steps.title: Generate a Regression Test
steps.description: Before fixing, create a test case that reproduces the bug, ensuring the fix is permanent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unit test using Jest that reproduces the specific error identified. Ensure it fails currently.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a failing test case for the identified bug'

steps.title: Apply Surgical Patch
steps.description: Use AI to write the fix while maintaining your existing coding style and project standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a fix for the identified bug. Ensure the solution adheres to the project's existing design patterns and performance requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'fix the bug identified in the previous step'

steps.title: Verify and Commit
steps.description: Run the test suite and verify the fix before committing to Git.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix by running the test suite. If successful, generate a concise commit message following conventional commit standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm test && git commit -m "fix: resolved memory leak in auth controller"'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken' state to a separate debug branch before letting AI touch it to maintain a clean rollback point.
Use Claude Code's 'ignore' file to prevent the AI from indexing massive dependency folders, which saves tokens and increases speed.
Ask your AI to 'explain the logic' of the fix before applying it to ensure you understand the change for client handover.
Maintain a 'system prompt' for your projects that defines your specific coding style so the AI output remains consistent.
When debugging complex state issues, ask the AI to generate a sequence diagram of the data flow to visualize the bottleneck.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully patched your bug, integrate these commands into your CI/CD pipeline to automate regression testing on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your schedule and start shipping code that works the first time. Join our community of elite builders to master AI-driven development and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
